{{CargoOrgan
|name=FT's Left Brain
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10879
|idx=86
|description="…Upon arrival, we found only half of a living brain. The other half had been skewered and grilled by local children… we must admit, the aroma was quite… compelling." 
—Superbrain Files
|skill=
|hp=2676
|def=200
|atk=188
|rush=190
|gene1=Per 10 Gene Seg. devoured, {race} DEF +5
Specimen devoured: 400/400
|gene2=CRIT DMG REDUC +7.5%
|gene3=In explorations, 2x Card Drops +6%
|gene4=Per 10 Sim Core LVL, {race} ATK +5
Sim Core: 500/500
|gene5=Gaia Rocket Cabin, deployable robots +3
|gene7=Gaia Rocket Cabin, deployable robots +9 (Awakened)
|}}
